title: Eye Examinations - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Eye Examinations 14 Matching Service Providers BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF SALEM, MARION AND POLK COUNTIES HEALTH AND DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental treatment of cavities, screenings, dental sealants, fluoride application, cleanings, diet counseling, and eye exams for students. Also provides oral health education to parents and students. 1395 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Uninsured and underinsured youth grades 1-12 Hours: Varies Email (503) 581-7383 1034 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS FREE CLINIC VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLACKAMAS FREE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical services for individuals without access to health care. Volunteer medical professionals offer routine preventative and non-emergency medical care. For chronic conditions such as hypertension, diabetes, asthma, and heart disease, care is provided in addition to education and equipment for self-care. Eye exams and glasses are also available. More specialized services that cannot be provided on-site are referred to a network of specialty physicians in the region. 19600 Molalla Avenue Clairmont Hall Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: -Age 18 and older with income -400% of the federal poverty guidelines for the previous 3 months -No health insurance or access to health care. -Gap insurance/medical care needed temporarily, underinsured (cannot afford care for chronic conditions under current health care plan) Hours: -Tuesday-Thursday 1pm-4pm (some Thursday evening appointments available) -Vision care appointments available on Tuesdays Email (503) 722-4400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS VISION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a vision clinic twice per year. Services may include vision exams, screenings, and glasses. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: Uninsured adults age 18 and older Hours: By appointment Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EYECARE AMERICA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive eye exams and up to one year of follow-up care at no out-of-pocket cost for conditions diagnosed during the initial exam. 655 Beach Street San Francisco, CA 94109 Eligibility: Must meet these criteria: -A US citizen or legal resident -18 years old or older -Not belong to an HMO or a PPO, nor have private insurance nor benefits through the Department of Veterans Affairs -Not seen by an ophthalmologist (medical eye doctor) in 3 or more years -Not seen by an EyeCare America volunteer ophthalmologist in the past Hours: Not applicable Email (877) 887-6327 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ILLINOIS VALLEY LIONS CLUB VISION AND HEARING SCREENINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eye and hearing exams. Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: No standard hours (541) 592-4135 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JEFFERSON LIONS CLUB VISION AND HEARING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eye exams and glasses. Also provides referrals for eye surgery and hearing aids. 107 Main Street Jefferson, OR 97352 Eligibility: Low-income households, uninsured and underinsured people Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 339-5069 Get Directions More Details LEGACY HEALTH DEVERS MEMORIAL EYE INSTITUTE EYE CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general and specialty eye care, including exams, treatment, diagnostic testing, laser procedures, surgery, and low vision rehabilitation. 1040 NW 22nd Avenue Suite 168 Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Age 16 and older who meet income guidelines Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 413-8202 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTOMETRY CARES THE AOA FOUNDATION INFANTSEE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive eye and vision assessments. 243 N Lindbergh Boulevard Saint Louis, MO 63141 Eligibility: Infants 6-12 months old Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-3pm Email (314) 983-4160 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON LIONS SIGHT AND HEARING FOUNDATION SIGHT AND HEARING HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals to local Lions Clubs, which assist people in need of eye exams, eyeglasses, hearing exams, and hearing aids. Assistance depends on eligibility and funds available at each local club. No assistance with regular contact lenses for vision correction. 1010 NW 22nd Avenue Suite 144 Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Individuals who have a gross household income at or below 200% of FPL and have exhausted all other resources to pay for treatement. Individual Lions Clubs may have other specific eligibility requirements. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Closed holidays. Email (503) 413-7399 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PACIFIC UNIVERSITY PACIFIC EYE CLINIC BEAVERTON PACIFIC EYE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Full-service clinic accepts members of the public on an appointment basis for eye/vision examinations. They provide complete vision and eye health examinations for glasses and contact lenses. Exams take between 90-120 minutes. 12600 SW Crescent Street Suite 130 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Clinic: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Optical: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 352-1699 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PACIFIC UNIVERSITY PACIFIC EYE CLINIC CORNELIUS PACIFIC EYE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Full-service clinic accepts members of the public on an appointment basis for eye/vision examinations. Provides functional low-vision assessments. Patients continue receiving regular and emergency care from their primary eye care providers. 2214 E 13th Street Vancouver, WA 98661 Eligibility: Low-vision patients Hours: By appointment only, two days a week, generally from September through May (360) 947-3302 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF SALEM, MARION AND POLK COUNTIES HEALTH AND DENTAL SERVICES CLACKAMAS FREE CLINIC VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLACKAMAS FREE CLINIC JEFFERSON LIONS CLUB VISION AND HEARING PROGRAM LEGACY HEALTH EYE CARE SERVICES OREGON LIONS SIGHT AND HEARING FOUNDATION SIGHT AND HEARING HELP PACIFIC UNIVERSITY PACIFIC EYE CLINIC PACIFIC UNIVERSITY PACIFIC EYE CLINIC PACIFIC UNIVERSITY PACIFIC EYE CLINIC PACIFIC UNIVERSITY PACIFIC EYE CLINIC
